cobblemon.species.goomba.name: Goomba
cobblemon.species.goomba-partnergoomba.d: Some Goombas choose to be more friendly and accompany others on adventures, gaining additional strength from their friendship

cobblemon.species.paragoomba.name: Paragoomba
cobblemon.species.goomba-paragoomba.desc: A minor minion, but one who has obtained wings.
cobblemon.species.paragoomba.desc: A minor minion, but one who has obtained wings.
cobblemon.species.goomba-paragoomba-grou: A Paragoomba whose wings have been knocked off temporarily.
cobblemon.species.paragoomba-paragoomba-: A Paragoomba whose wings have been knocked off temporarily.
cobblemon.species.spikedgoomba.name: Spiked Goomba
cobblemon.species.goomba-spikedgoomba.de: A minor minion, but armored with a dangerous hat.
cobblemon.species.spikedgoomba.desc: A minor minion, but armored with a dangerous hat.
cobblemon.species.hypergoomba.name: Hyper Goomba
cobblemon.species.hypergoomba.desc1: A green Goomba that can charge itself up for powerful attacks.
cobblemon.species.hyperparagoomba.name: Hyper Paragoomba
cobblemon.species.hypergoomba-paragoomba: A winged green Goomba that can charge itself up for powerful attacks.
cobblemon.species.paragoomba.desc1: A winged green Goomba that can charge itself up for powerful attacks.
cobblemon.species.hyperspikedgoomba.name: Hyper Spiked Goomba
cobblemon.species.hypergoomba-spikedgoom: A spiked green Goomba that can charge itself up for powerful attacks.
cobblemon.species.hyperspikedgoomba.desc: A spiked green Goomba that can charge itself up for powerful attacks.
cobblemon.species.gloomba.name: Gloomba
cobblemon.species.gloomba.desc1: A shadowy Goomba which is only found in dark underground areas.
cobblemon.species.paragloomba.name: Paragloomba
cobblemon.species.gloomba-paragoomba.des: A shadowy winged Goomba which is only found in dark underground areas.
cobblemon.species.paragloomba.desc1: A shadowy winged Goomba which is only found in dark underground areas.
cobblemon.species.spikedgloomba.name: Spiked Gloomba
cobblemon.species.gloomba-spikedgoomba.d: A shadowy spiked Goomba which is only found in dark underground areas.
cobblemon.species.spikedgloomba.desc1: A shadowy spiked Goomba which is only found in dark underground areas.
cobblemon.species.bluegoomba.name: Blue Goomba
cobblemon.species.bluegoomba.desc1: A slightly stronger goomba species with a blue tint
cobblemon.species.redgoomba.name: Red Goomba
cobblemon.species.redgoomba.desc1: A slightly stronger goomba species with a red tint
cobblemon.species.royalgoomba.name: Royal Goomba
cobblemon.species.royalgoomba.desc1: A large goomba, who rules over other goombas
cobblemon.species.supergoomba.name: Super Goomba
cobblemon.species.supergoomba.desc1: A lucky Goomba who has gotten their non-existent hands on some fancy magical boots and headwear to match
cobblemon.species.ultragoomba.name: Ultra Goomba
cobblemon.species.ultragoomba.desc1: An extremely lucky Goomba who has managed to be empowered by some mighty magical boots, helmet, and even some wings too
cobblemon.species.invinshroom.name: Invinshroom
cobblemon.species.invinshroom.desc: A weak creature who has somehow come across immense power and is neigh invulnerable.
cobblemon.species.koopa.name: Koopa
cobblemon.species.koopa.desc1: A turtle like creature, Koopas can be found all over,
cobblemon.species.partnerkoopa.name: Partner Koopa
cobblemon.species.partnerkoopa.desc1: Some Koopas choose to be more friendly and accompany others on adventures, gaining additional strength from their friendship
cobblemon.species.parakoopa.name: Parakoopa
cobblemon.species.parakoopa.desc1: A turtle like creature, Koopas can be found all over,
cobblemon.species.kpkoopa.name: KP Koopa
cobblemon.species.kpkoopa.desc1: A Koopa who has trained to be a proficient and fancy fighter.
cobblemon.species.kpkoopa.desc2: The KP is just ''Koopa Troopa'' abbreviated, it looks flashier.
cobblemon.species.kpparakoopa.name: KP Parakoopa
cobblemon.species.kpparakoopa.desc1: A winged Koopa who has trained to be a proficient and fancy fighter.
cobblemon.species.kpparakoopa.desc2: The KP is just ''Koopa Troopa'' abbreviated, it looks flashier.
cobblemon.species.hammerbro.name: Hammer Bro
cobblemon.species.hammerbro.desc1: A trained Koopa fighter, who wields throwing hammers
cobblemon.species.firebro.name: Fire Bro
cobblemon.species.firebro.desc1: A trained Koopa fighter, who flings fire
cobblemon.species.boomerangbro.name: Boomerang Bro
cobblemon.species.boomerangbro.desc1: A trained Koopa fighter, who wields a boomerang with surprising skill
cobblemon.species.icebro.name: Ice Bro
cobblemon.species.icebro.desc1: A trained Koopa fighter, who slings snow
cobblemon.species.darkkoopa.name: Dark Koopa
cobblemon.species.darkkoopa.desc1: A Koopa who has grown used to dark environments
cobblemon.species.shadykoopa.name: Shady Koopa
cobblemon.species.shadykoopa.desc1: A Koopa who has dwelled in darkness so long they now play tricks on those who cross their path
cobblemon.species.koopatrol.name: Koopatrol
cobblemon.species.koopatrol.desc1: An elite Koopa warrior who has earned impressive armor.
cobblemon.species.darkkoopatrol.name: Dark Koopatrol
cobblemon.species.darkkoopatrol.desc1: An armored Koopa corrupted and empowered by dark forces,
cobblemon.species.darkkoopatrol.desc2: or perhaps created from them entirely?
cobblemon.species.magikoopa.name: Magikoopa
cobblemon.species.magikoopa.desc1: A magical Koopa who has forgone their shell for robes.
cobblemon.species.kamek.name: Kamek
cobblemon.species.kamek.desc1: A elder magical Koopa who has forgone his shell for robes.
cobblemon.species.kammykoopa.name: Kammy Koopa
cobblemon.species.kammykoopa.desc1: A elder magical Koopa who has forgone her shell for robes.
cobblemon.species.tutankoopa.name: Tutankoopa
cobblemon.species.tutankoopa.desc1: A Koopa wizard who has taken residence in a sandy temple
cobblemon.species.bowser.name: Bowser
cobblemon.species.bowser.desc1: A large and fearsome ruler of Koopa-kind, this turtle-dragon-y monster can spew flames
cobblemon.species.jrtroopa1.name: Jr. Troopa
cobblemon.species.jrtroopa1.desc1: A small yet mighty Koopa, the shell this one wears is an eggshell rather than a turtley one
cobblemon.species.kentckoopa.name: Kent C. Koopa
cobblemon.species.kentckoopa.desc1: A very large Koopa with great defenses and equally-but-inversely awful eyesight
cobblemon.ability.goombaability.desc: Most common Goombas take extra damage from attacks that strike from above, squashing them.
cobblemon.ability.goombaabilityplus.desc: Some Goombas have harder heads than most, and not only dont get squashed, but deal extra damage with bites and head-based attacks.
cobblemon.ability.paragoombaability.desc: Most Paragoombas are regular Goombas with magic stick-on wings, attack them from above and they get knocked to the ground.
Stronger Paragoombas can resist having their wings knocked off, and use their stronger wings to deal more damage with attacks which swoop in from above, and are more maneuverable than one would expect.
cobblemon.ability.spikedgoombaability.de: These goombas have obtained a spiked helmet which protects them from attacks from above, unless the attacker has adequate protection, in which case they get squashed all the same. Makes their head attacks hurt more too.
cobblemon.ability.spikedgoombaabilityplu: All the pain of a regular Spiked Goomba, none of the squishiness. And that spike's even sharper now.
cobblemon.ability.partnergoombaability.d: A much less violent Goomba than most, also not susceptible to squashing. Does more damage with their head and with bites.
cobblemon.ability.gloombaability.desc: Raises Attack when hit with a Dark-type move, resists being Intimidated, and is squashible
cobblemon.ability.gloombaabilityplus.des: Raises Attack when hit with a Dark-type move, resists being Intimidated, and deals extra damage with bites and head-based attacks
cobblemon.ability.paragloombaability.des: A combination of Darkness Denizen and Flying Flunky
cobblemon.ability.paragloombaabilityplus: A combination of Durable Darkness and Feathered Fighter
cobblemon.ability.spikedgloombaaiblity.d: A combination of Darkness Denizen and Harmful Helmet
cobblemon.ability.spikedgloombaaiblitypl: A combination of Durable Darkness and Headstrong Henchling
cobblemon.ability.hypergoombaability.des: Boosts Attack or Special Attack, alternating, for each boost used. Squashable.
cobblemon.ability.hypergoombaabilityplus: Boosts Attack or Special Attack, alternating, for each boost used. Extra bite and head-based damage.
cobblemon.ability.hyperparagoombaability: A combination of Charging Chump and Flying Flunky
A combination of Concentrated Charge and Feathered Fighter
cobblemon.ability.hyperspikedgoombaabili: A combination of Charging Chump and Harmful Helmet
A combination of Concentrated Charge and Headstrong Henchling
cobblemon.ability.ultragoombaability.des: These elite goombas deal damage with their defensive head spike, and have the boosts from their wings as well.
cobblemon.ability.koopakonqueror.desc: This fearsome draconic turtle is also a master of Dark and Fire attacks, gaining STAB with them.
cobblemon.ability.throwingbroproficiency: Experts of throwing things, certain moves the user uses lose the Contact property, Fling gains a different typing based on their held item, and replaces certain held items when Flung. Additionally treated as a Fighting type for move effectiveness, with additive effect if the user is already Fighting type.
cobblemon.move.headbonk.desc: The user jumps in the air and bonks their head down upon their target.
cobblemon.move.divekick.desc: The user flies over to their target and delivers a swift diving kick form above.
cobblemon.move.multibonk.desc: The user preforms a skillful repeated headbonking to their victim.
cobblemon.move.spikebonk.desc: The user jumps in the air and plummets towards their opponent with their dangerous spiked head.
cobblemon.move.rallywink.desc: The user gives an encouraging wink to their ally, causing them to move again this turn!
cobblemon.move.tattle.desc: The user wracks their brain for all combat-relevant knowledge on a chosen target, and relays it back to their trainer.
cobblemon.move.dizzyshell.desc: The user spins in their shell in a reckless and confusing fashion, then strikes multiple opponents. High chance to Confuse.
cobblemon.move.fireshell.desc: The user sets their shell ablaze, then hits their opponent. Might inflict Burn.
cobblemon.move.powershell.desc: The user withdraws into its shell, then  flings themselves at their foe with great force.
cobblemon.move.revengeshell.desc: The user rapidly spins in their shell, then launches and vengeful and confusing attack. Deals more damage based on user's statuses. Small chance to confuse.
cobblemon.move.shellshield.desc: The user provides their ally with a large shell shield for defense.
cobblemon.move.shellslam.desc: The user withdraws into its shell, then fires at their enemy with devastating force, piercing defenses.
cobblemon.move.shelltoss.desc: The user withdraws into its shell, then flings themselves at their opponent.
